stack.ssrf-guard: @jeswr/guarded-fetch (git: jeswr/guarded-fetch, pinned sha; inlined into dist)

federation.membershipTodo: SDK (not an app) — it reads/writes fedapp:App registrations and CONSUMES a fedreg: federation registry rather than holding a membership of its own. verify() validates a registration against the fedapp vocab; list() discovers self-asserted registrations from a registry resource / app-registry container; selfDescribe() builds an app's own fedapp:App self-description. discoverFromRegistry() lists the registry-asserted fedreg:Membership records of a federation Catalogue/Registry (SSRF-guarded), and resolveStorageSpecVersion() reads a storage's advertised client-client spec-versions for schema-migration coordination.
